name: mission_types
description: Mission type selection (Core Rules pp.85, 87). Battles fall into five categories based on narrative context, not random rolls.

OPPORTUNITY.name: Opportunity Mission
OPPORTUNITY.description: Always available. Default if no other mission type applies.

PATRON.name: Patron Mission
PATRON.description: From an accepted Patron job. Includes Danger Pay and possible Benefits/Hazards/Conditions.

RIVAL.name: Rival Mission
RIVAL.description: Forced when Rivals track you down, or when you track them via crew task.
RIVAL.notes: No Win condition objective. Use rival_attack_types table from rival_involvement.json.

QUEST.name: Quest Mission
QUEST.description: Pursuing an active Quest. Quest finale always uses Fight Off with +1 enemy.

INVASION.name: Invasion Battle
INVASION.description: Triggered by Invasion check. No payment, no Deployment Conditions, no Notable Sights, no Battlefield Finds.

selection_options.description: Select Your Job options (Core Rules p.85). Player chooses one per campaign turn.

options.description: Attack a Rival — if you Tracked them successfully via crew task.
Continue a Quest — if you have an active Quest.
Patron job — if you have an active Patron with available jobs.
